summary: Testing completed for MVPLine Message Templates and Calendar features. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working after fix to import path in templates.tsx. Fixed import bug: '../../src/store/authStore' → '../../store/authStore'.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed import path bug in /app/frontend/app/settings/templates.tsx line 17: changed from '../../src/store/authStore' to '../../store/authStore'
seed_data_creation: None required - Templates API auto-creates 5 default templates for new users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Templates feature fully working. Backend has full CRUD API for templates at /api/templates/{user_id}. Frontend has Message Templates management at /settings/templates. Thread view loads templates from API via keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Shift+T or via attach menu. Calendar settings page loads without errors on web (device calendar only available on native mobile).

backend_templates_api.get_templates: PASS - Returns list of templates with 5 defaults for new users
backend_templates_api.create_template: PASS - Creates custom template, returns with _id
backend_templates_api.cannot_delete_default: PASS - Returns 400 for default template deletion

frontend_templates.more_tab_has_templates: PASS - Message Templates option visible in Features section
frontend_templates.templates_settings_page: PASS - Shows all templates with icons, categories, usage counts
frontend_templates.templates_modal_in_thread: PASS - All 5 API templates load in conversation modal

calendar_settings.page_loads: PASS - Calendar Settings page loads without errors
calendar_settings.google_calendar_section: PASS - Shows Not Connected status with Connect button
calendar_settings.device_calendar: N/A - Only shows on native mobile (expected behavior on web)

templates_page_import_error.impact: Page was failing to render, causing 'Message Templates' to not appear in More tab DOM

noted: Google Calendar OAuth - OAuth flow requires real credentials to complete
